title: Iran's radicalized regime fuels threat of nuclear bomb
subhed: Donald Trump seems to be considering ending the war with Tehran without addressing the nuclear issue. Yet the conflict has only made Iran's nuclear program more opaque and fueled the determination of its new leaders to acquire nuclear weapons.

title: 'Donald Trump unwittingly, but significantly, advances the energy transition'
subhed: In the wake of the global oil and gas shock triggered by the American strike on Iran, the president of the United States has turned into something of a climate doctor, accelerating the shift of major economies toward decarbonized energy, writes economist Patrice Geoffron in this op-ed for Le Monde.

title: Dinosaur egg trove discovered in Hérault
subhed: The Musée des dinosaures de Mèze has announced the discovery of about 100 dinosaur eggs dating back approximately 72 million years, making this deposit one of the most significant in the world.

title: Five Paris design exhibitions not to miss this spring
subhed: From Elizabeth Garouste's floral furniture to Gaetano Pesce's office pieces and Jean-Michel Wilmotte's sculptural works, this is Le Monde's selection of the French capital's must-see events this season.

subhed: Sociologist Stéphane Beaud and historian Gérard Noiriel analyze why people who have experienced racism – such as Bally Bagayoko, Saint-Denis's new mayor – may reject the label 'racialized.'

title: Dubai seeks normalcy at all costs after a month of war
subhed: Due to its economic importance and its proximity to Israel, the United Arab Emirates has become a target for Iran. Yet in the wealthy city-state, it is not so much missiles, but the economic threat that worries the population.

title: French archives of Spaniards who fled Franco's dictatorship are now available online
subhed: From March 30, over 180,000 records are accessible on the French Office for the Protection of Refugees and Stateless Persons' website, due to funding from Spain aimed at preserving the memory of people's 40 years of exile in France.
